description: Comprehensive monitoring dashboard for Proxmox VE using pve-exporter. Includes Node, VM, LXC, Storage, ZFS, and Hardware Sensor metrics.

targets.expr: max by (id,name,node) (pve_cpu_usage_ratio{id=~"qemu/.+"} * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"}))
max by (id,name,node) (rate(pve_network_receive_bytes_total{id=~"qemu/.+"}[5m]) * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"}))
max by (id,name,node) (rate(pve_network_transmit_bytes_total{id=~"qemu/.+"}[5m]) * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"}))
max by (id) (pve_up{id=~"qemu/.+"}) * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"})
max by (id) (pve_cpu_usage_ratio{id=~"qemu/.+"}) * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"})
max by (id) (pve_memory_usage_bytes{id=~"qemu/.+"}) * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"})
max by (id) (pve_uptime_seconds{id=~"qemu/.+"}) * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"})
max by (id,name,node) (rate(pve_disk_read_bytes_total{id=~"qemu/.+"}[5m]) * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"}))
max by (id,name,node) (rate(pve_disk_written_bytes_total{id=~"qemu/.+"}[5m]) * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"}))
max by (id,name,node) (pve_memory_usage_bytes{id=~"qemu/.+"} * on(id) group_left(name,node) max by (id,name,node) (pve_guest_info{type="qemu",node=~"$node"}))

title: Proxmox VE - pve-exporter
